subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends! Jinab-i-Jamshid hath written a letter and made mention of those spiritual companions [3.5s]... ...To be a Baha’í is to be the embodiment of all human virtues.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسیان جناب جمشید نامه مرقوم نموده و ذکر آن یاران روحانی را کرده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @thankfulness; gratitude
